enterpriseSection.title: Enterprise hosting, without the complexity
enterpriseSection.description: HostingPro delivers enterprise-ready performance with built-in security, performance monitoring, and automatic platform maintenance—saving companies engineering time and resources. Get the enterprise managed hosting platform trusted by global brands.

reviews.title: I've launched many websites personally and professionally with HostingPro.
reviews.description: From small local farmers listing their locations on a map, to nationwide hardware store ordering systems and real estate agent CMS integrations. The benefits are that a small team of developers can launch high-performing systems quickly and inexpensively.

testimonial.quote: [HostingPro] Newsroom brought our editorial workflows, assets, and analytics together in one place. We publish faster, collaborate better, and finally understand what content performs.

tabs.title: Agency efficiency
tabs.description: Streamline your development workflows with pre-configured environments and automated deployments. Focus on building great experiences while we handle the complex infrastructure.

tabs.title: Developer freedom
tabs.description: Work with your preferred frameworks and tools while maintaining full flexibility and scalability across your projects.

tabs.title: Brand impact
tabs.description: Deliver fast, consistent, and engaging digital experiences that elevate your brand presence across platforms.

items.title: One, holistic solution
items.description: Reduces your time spent integrating multiple vendors in your tech stack, saves you money, and allows you to spend more time innovating.

items.title: Node.js frontend
items.description: Unlock new opportunities with higher-budget projects. Build with your choice of modern front-end JavaScript framework.

items.title: High-performance hosting
items.description: Achieve up to 10x performance with global CDN, the fastest TTFB scores, and smart scaling and auto-healing Node hosting.

items.title: Robust CMS
items.description: Reduce your clients' learning curve, give your dev team more flexibility, and save on sunk costs compared to other enterprise CMSs.

items.title: Platform blueprints
items.description: Jump-start your projects with pre-configured environments, templates, and demo content to quickly learn.

items.title: GraphQL API
items.description: Optionally enable a GraphQL API to render pages and content on your frontend and query your data with enhanced clarity.

items.title: Content modeling
items.description: Model your data structure and editing experience while empowering both content creators and developers.

items.title: Developer toolkit
items.description: An optional, super fast toolkit for bringing common features like previews and page template hierarchy to your project.

items.title: Smart Search
items.description: Deliver a smarter, easier, and faster way to enable headless search with minimal configuration and an intuitive UI.

items.title: The Rise of Multi-CMS in the Enterprise

performanceSection.title: Proven faster performance
performanceSection.description: See how our hosting stacks up against competitors with real-world performance tests and speed benchmarks.

seo.metaTitle: Hosting Performance Comparison | Faster Website Speed Benchmarks
seo.metaDescription: Compare real-world website performance metrics like TTFB and page speed improvements. Discover how HostingPro outperforms Bluehost, GoDaddy, Hostinger, and WP Engine.

ttfbComparison.title: Real website Time To First Byte (TTFB) comparison
ttfbComparison.note: Lower TTFB means faster website performance

speedImprovements.title: Page speed results after migration to HostingPro
speedImprovements.description: Actual performance improvements observed after migrating real websites to HostingPro hosting.

performanceSection.disclaimer: Based on a comparison of real-world page speed and TTFB metrics of WordPress websites migrated from leading hosting providers including Bluehost, GoDaddy, Hostinger, and WP Engine to HostingPro. Data measured using Google Lighthouse and Speed Index metrics. Results may vary based on configuration and region.
